title: Chio HTTP Stream Frame
description: A single streamed tool-output frame emitted over the chio-http edge. Mirrors the JSON-RPC notification constructed by `queue_tool_stream_chunk_notifications` in `crates/chio-mcp-edge/src/runtime/protocol.rs` (lines 94-117). Each frame is a JSON-RPC 2.0 notification carrying one chunk produced by `ToolCallStream::chunks` (see `crates/chio-kernel/src/runtime.rs` lines 109-125) and uses the wire method `notifications/chio/tool_call_chunk` declared in `crates/chio-mcp-edge/src/runtime.rs` line 53. The optional `_meta.io.modelcontextprotocol/related-task` annotation is appended by `attach_related_task_meta_to_message` (`crates/chio-mcp-edge/src/runtime/protocol.rs` lines 343-368), which inserts `_meta` INSIDE `params` (not at the top level), so the schema reflects the same nesting. The MCP-style `_meta` envelope intentionally permits arbitrary string keys (for example the `io.modelcontextprotocol/related-task` annotation), but each annotation value is bounded to a single object level: `_meta` itself is an object whose values are JSON scalars, arrays of scalars, or one-level-deep objects whose values are scalars or arrays of scalars. The overall recursion depth is therefore `params -> _meta -> <annotation> -> <one inner object>`, so schema-driven consumers can rely on a fixed traversal depth.

jsonrpc.description: Protocol version literal. Always the string '2.0'.

method.description: Chio tool-streaming notification method, exposed in code as `CHIO_TOOL_STREAMING_NOTIFICATION_METHOD`.

params.description: Notification params. Carries the chunk payload plus the optional MCP-style `_meta` annotations attached by `attach_related_task_meta_to_message`. `_meta` is intentionally nested inside `params` (not at the top level) to match the runtime emission path.

requestId.description: Identifier of the originating tool-call request. Mirrors the JSON-RPC `id` value the caller supplied (typically a string or integer).

chunkIndex.description: Zero-based index of this chunk within the stream.

totalChunks.description: Total number of chunks the kernel observed for this stream at notification time. Equal to `ToolCallStream::chunk_count()`.

chunk.description: Chunk payload. The kernel forwards `ToolCallChunk::data` verbatim and applies no shape constraints, so any JSON value is permitted.

_meta.description: Optional MCP-style notification metadata. Chio attaches the related-task annotation when a parent task is in flight. Each top-level key (`io.modelcontextprotocol/related-task` and any future MCP annotation) maps to a value bounded to a single object level so the overall traversal depth is fixed at `_meta -> <annotation> -> <one inner object>`.

additionalProperties.description: MCP-style annotation value. Permitted shapes: any JSON scalar, an array of scalars, or a single-level-deep object whose values are themselves scalars or arrays of scalars. Deeper nesting is rejected so that schema-driven consumers can rely on a fixed traversal depth.
